name: T&T - Combat Assistant
description:
# T&T - Combat Assistant

**Author:** [AmadeusVF](https://app.roll20.net/users/15900768/amadeusvf)  
**Version:** 1.0.0 Public Release

Combat Assistant is a lightweight Roll20 API script for D&D games. It reads Roll20 attack, damage, healing, saving throw, and initiative rolls, then creates chat-based combat menus so the GM and players can apply damage, healing, temporary HP, saving throws, and combat results faster.

For more information, visit my [patreon](https://www.patreon.com/cw/AmadeusVF/home).

## Main Features

- **Roll20 roll capture:** reads attacks, damage, healing, saves, and initiative from Roll20 D&D 2014 and 2024 sheets.
- **Combat menus:** creates chat buttons for the GM and players to apply damage, healing, hit, miss, and save results.
- **Damage handling:** applies resistance, vulnerability, immunity, temporary HP, linked HP, and unlinked token HP.
- **Group saving throws:** checks selected tokens together and supports player prompts when enabled.
- **Group initiative:** rolls initiative for selected groups and writes the turn order for 2014 and 2024 sheets.
- **Combat logs:** posts public results with token icons and optional hidden names or damage source reveal.

## Requirements

The campaign must use the **Experimental** API sandbox.

## Basic Use

- `!ca menu` opens the Combat Assistant menu.
- `!ca help` shows command help and setup notes.
